text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You want to know more about Air Shakur? But then why are you
asking me?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Surely you've heard about my session with her... She and I couldn't
see eye to eye. Heck, we barely spoke. I won't be much help.
choice_data_list:
Then do you have any insight into why you
didn't get along?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our last encounter, it doesn't seem wise to ask Air Shakur about
herself directly. So instead, I decide to ask others about their
impressions of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to know more about her—her achievements, her path up until
now... everything. The more I learn about her, the more I'll
understand.
choice_data_list: Please, anything you can tell me would help!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you there. I emailed you just now, so be sure to check your inbox.
Bye now.
choice_data_list: W-wait a minute!
W-wait a minute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my inbox, I find Agnes Tachyon's email... and the files attached to
it. Every single one looks like a complex research paper...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All of those were received from Shakur as part of a trade between
researchers. Her graphs and formula layouts should reveal something
about her inner workings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As should her blunt writing devoid of any flowery modifiers. While I
personally see commitment to aesthetics in her work...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
According to her, she's doing no such thing. I'm not sure I believe
that... Ah, I suppose those papers may be a tad difficult to
comprehend.
choice_data_list: Sure, but I'll still read them. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Well, I won't explain them either, so do your best. As long as you do that, something is bound to happen. I'm sure of it.
choice_data_list: Why are you helping me?
Why are you helping me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"Helping" you certainly was not my intention. But as a researcher... I
do not want anything to impede progress. Yours or hers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So begins my days of collecting information on Air Shakur. I watch
countless recordings and inquire with other trainers and her
classmates alike. Until...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I better find a trainer soon. Why did a trainer have to be one of the
conditions to debut... Guess it's a bit late to object.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: A trainer, huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You still want to win though, right?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You still want to win though, right?"

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(No matter who I pick, they're going to be a pain. In that case,
anyone's fine... Not like they'll do much anyway.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(That said... The thought of seeing their confused face every day
makes my skin crawl. And what's the point of debuting... if I already
know what will happen?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should just give up.
choice_data_list: Do you mean that?
Do you mean that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Not like it would be that weird to say. Maybe now's just the time to quit.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I mean, who the hell wants to play a game they already know the
ending to? Morons, that's who.
choice_data_list: And you're no moron.
And you're no moron.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...You're right. So—
choice_data_list: But you won't give up. Because you want to win.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After retracing her steps through reports and recordings, I've come to
know a fraction of the effort she's put into winning the Derby. So I
know for a fact...
choice_data_list: You won't give up. Ever.
You won't give up. Ever.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I hate when people talk to me like that. You don't know me, so quit
acting like it.
choice_data_list: You're right. I don't know you...
You're right. I don't know you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I try, I may never catch even a glimpse of her
world... but that won't stop me from trying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she'll let me, I'm sure we can work together to achieve her goal.
Even if we aren't alike, our eyes can still settle on the same horizon.
choice_data_list:
But I don't want to give up on trying to
understand you either.

But I don't want to give up on trying to
understand you either.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
How the... You can't even write code. And you base your actions on
ambiguous things like dreams. We're nothing alike.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You really think... you can understand me? How could you? And even if you could... What good would it do?
choice_data_list: In order to figure that out, I'll need your help.
In order to figure that out, I'll need your help.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And what if... it all amounts to nothing? Are you really—
choice_data_list: Yes! I want to be your trainer!
Yes! I want to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I seriously don't get you. Training me wouldn't benefit you in any
way.
choice_data_list: Of course it would.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? How?
choice_data_list: I get to see you win!
I get to see you win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I want to see the moment her hard work—her obsession pays off. As a trainer, there could be no greater reward than that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I knew it, you don't understand a word I'm saying... Not really seeing
the benefit for me either at this point.
choice_data_list: Well, you get to debut, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I won't need to debut if I quit, right?
choice_data_list:
Well, I'll be around if you decide to stick with
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell was up with that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "But I don't want to give up on trying to understand you either."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "But I don't want to give up on trying to understand you either."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Shut up. Piss off. Even if you could get me... what good would your
stubborn ass do anyways?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Although... I suppose persistence is the one thing we have in
common.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I've yet to find a way to breach those seven centimeters. Nothing's
changed since I first calculated my chances. But...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Giving up... just doesn't feel right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, I spot Air Shakur as I'm out and about. Worried, I decide
to watch over her from a distance until she returns to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, you've been following that girl for a while now. Care to
tell me why?

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
We've received reports of someone stalking Umamusume at night.
Perhaps you could tell me what you know about that at the station?
choice_data_list: W-wait, I don't—
W-wait, I don't—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh... Guess I have no choice.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, leave 'em alone. Can't you see they're scared? Besides...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That "stalker" is my trainer... Isn't that right?
